Author: BimboPlugins
Name: Poser
Description: A lightweight UI and command utility to instantly switch between your available idle, ground sit, chair sit, and doze poses. Use the GUI (/poser), configuration menu (/poserconfig), or targeted slash commands (/pidle, /psit, /pgsit, /pdoze) to snap directly to a specific pose index. You can also use subcommands directly from the main command (e.g., /poser idle 2, /poser sit 1).
Punchline: Instantly switch your idle, sit, and doze poses.
